violations.text: The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria (to the side of the kitchen), are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

A section of the floor and wall junctures under the dishwasher do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

Thermometer is lacking in the 2-door reach-in unit. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

The doors to the outside, located to the side of the kitchen in the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the 2 doors at the bottom. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

Small section of the floor and wall junctures under the dishwasher do not have coving. In addition, coving near the service line is cracked and missing a piece. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the doors at the bottom. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

A small section of the floor and wall junctures under the dishwasher do not have coving. In addition, the coving near the service line is cracked/missing piece. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria in front of the kitchen, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the 2 doors at the bottom. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink and sanitizing bottles. Test strips have expired. New test strips must be obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
Faucet at the 3-bay sink is still leaking. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

A small section of the floor and wall junctures under the dishwasher still do not have coving. In addition, a section of the coving near the service line is missing/cracked. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The doors to the outside, located at the front of the cafeteria (both sides), are not tight-fitting. Space observed between and at the bottom of the doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
Faucet at the 3-bay sink observed to be leaking. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

A section of the floor and wall junctures under the dishwasher is lacking some coving. At the service line a tile of the coving is missing/cracked. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The doors to the outside, located at the front of the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

The floor and wall junctures under the dishwasher (small section) do not have coving. Coving by the service line is cracked and missing a piece. Coving must be repaired/replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria are still not tight-fitting. There is a visible space between the two doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2023

The hot hold unit is not in good repair. The thermometer gauge does not function properly to provide the temperature of the unit. Unit must be properly repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

The wall above the 3-bay sink is in poor repair. The paint is peeling. In addition, there is coving missing behind the dishwasher and coving is cracked at the service line area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
